steps.title: Apply the percent increase formula
steps.content: Identify the original price ($16), new price ($80), and change (\$80 - $16 = $64).

steps.title: Calculate the percent increase
steps.content: $$\frac{64}{16} \times 100\% = 4 \times 100\% = 400\%$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
